state_before.task: Write a story about Open Source Agentic Frameworks

added.story_text: The young developer, Elara, stood before the chasm of her new project, a daunting digital cathedral that seemed impossible to construct from scratch. To lay every foundational stone and forge every logical beam alone would take a lifetime. Then, she discovered the shared scaffoldings—the open-source frameworks. They were not finished buildings, but magnificent, tested skeletons of code, crafted and reinforced by thousands of architects before her. She no longer had to invent the staircase or perfect the archway; she could instead select from a vast library of trusted components, allowing her to focus on the unique stained-glass windows and soaring buttresses that defined her vision. Her cathedral rose swiftly, not as a monument to solitary genius, but as the newest, brightest peak in a vast and interconnected skyline, built upon the silent, collaborative genius of a legion.
